name: otto-lite
description: Otto Lite — a free starter pack of 10 real estate AI skills for licensed agents. Includes 5 core skills (Humanizer, Market Researcher, Objection Handler, Crucial Conversations, Email Writer), 2 agent modes (Executive Assistant, Listing Assistant), and 3 workflows (New Listing Launch, Weekly Listing Update, Weekly Priorities). The free starter to the full Otto plugin.
